name: Traversing the Dragon Village .
description:
You find yourself deep within in a dark field filled with tiny tendrils
of silvery light and insubstantial shining motes of dust.  The weightlessness
of this environment is extremely disorienting, and you are having trouble 
keeping your sense of direction.
   All exits lead off into the Dragon Village field.

exits.description: The Dragon Village field leads off into infinity.
The Dragon Village field leads off into the depths.
The Dragon Village field leads off into infinity.
